<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  
  <meta charset='utf-8'>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" id="wixDesktopViewport" />
  <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
  <meta name="generator" content="Wix.com Website Builder"/>

  <link rel="icon" sizes="192x192" href="https://www.wix.com/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon"/>
  <link rel="shortcut icon" href="https://www.wix.com/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon"/>

  <!-- Segmenter Polyfill -->
  <script>
    if (!window.Intl || !window.Intl.Segmenter) {
      (function() {
        var script = document.createElement('script');
        script.src = 'https://static.parastorage.com/unpkg/@formatjs/intl-segmenter@11.7.10/polyfill.iife.js';
        document.head.appendChild(script);
      })();
    }
  </script>

  <!-- Legacy Polyfills -->
  <script nomodule="" src="https://static.parastorage.com/unpkg/core-js-bundle@3.2.1/minified.js"></script>
  <script nomodule="" src="https://static.parastorage.com/unpkg/focus-within-polyfill@5.0.9/dist/focus-within-polyfill.js"></script>

  <!-- Performance API Polyfills -->
  <script>
  (function () {
    var noop = function noop() {};
    if ("performance" in window === false) {
      window.performance = {};
    }
    window.performance.mark = performance.mark || noop;
    window.performance.measure = performance.measure || noop;
    if ("now" in window.performance === false) {
      var nowOffset = Date.now();
      if (performance.timing && performance.timing.navigationStart) {
        nowOffset = performance.timing.navigationStart;
      }
      window.performance.now = function now() {
        return Date.now() - nowOffset;
      };
    }
  })();
  </script>

  <script>window.viewerModel = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('wix-essential-viewer-model').textContent)</script>

  <!-- Globals Definitions -->
  <script>
    (function () {
      var now = Date.now()
      var activationStart = 0
      if (window.viewerModel && window.viewerModel.experiments && window.viewerModel.experiments['specs.thunderbolt.adjustForPrerenderActivation']) {
        try {
          var navEntry = performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0];
          if (navEntry && navEntry.activationStart > 0) {
            activationStart = navEntry.activationStart;
          }
        } catch (e) {}
      }
      window.initialTimestamps = {
        initialTimestamp: now,
        // initialRequestTimestamp approximates when the navigation started.
        // activationStart is added to account for prerendered pages: the page may have been
        // created well before the user actually navigated, and activationStart marks when
        // the prerendered page was activated (made visible). Adding it shifts timeOrigin
        // forward to reflect the real navigation time. For non-prerendered pages activationStart is 0.
        initialRequestTimestamp: Math.round(performance.timeOrigin ? performance.timeOrigin + activationStart : now - performance.now() + activationStart)
      }

      window.thunderboltTag = "libs-releases-GA-local"
      window.thunderboltVersion = "1.17086.0"
    })();
  </script>

  <script>
    window.commonConfig = viewerModel.commonConfig
  </script>

      <link rel="stylesheet" media="print" href="//static.parastorage.com/services/wix-header/5f10f445c9954ea3ed77cf0067a2ab1d76c0cd67f393d3b46585abc9/app.min.css" onload="this.onload=null;this.rel='stylesheet';this.media='all'">
<script id="wix-header-script" defer src="//static.parastorage.com/services/wix-header/5f10f445c9954ea3ed77cf0067a2ab1d76c0cd67f393d3b46585abc9/app.bundle.min.js"></script>
<script>
  window.document.getElementById('wix-header-script').onload = function () {
    window.WixHeader.render({
      isWixSite: true,
      target: document.querySelector('#WIX_HEADER'),
      replaceTarget: true,
      language: document.documentElement.getAttribute('lang') || 'en',
      ...window.WIX_HEADER_CONFIG,
    })
  };
</script>

    
      <link rel="stylesheet" media="print" href="//static.parastorage.com/services/wix-footer/f7de090e8c56774a1f1576a57dacc5fb07cc6a96d4244678709795a8/app.min.css" onload="this.onload=null;this.rel='stylesheet';this.media='all'">
<script id="wix-footer-script" defer src="//static.parastorage.com/services/wix-footer/f7de090e8c56774a1f1576a57dacc5fb07cc6a96d4244678709795a8/app.bundle.min.js"></script>
<script>
  window.document.getElementById('wix-footer-script').onload = function () {
    window.WixFooter.render({
      target: document.querySelector('#WIX_FOOTER'),
      replaceTarget: true,
      language: document.documentElement.getAttribute('lang') || 'en'
    })
  };
</script>

    
      <script src="https://accounts.google.com/gsi/client" async=""></script>
<script>
  (() => {
    const settings = {
      // Studio:
      // redirect: 'https://users.wix.com/signin?studio=true',
      // Logo Maker:
      // redirect: 'https://users.wix.com/signin?color=LOGO&redirectTo=https%3A%2F%2Fmanage.wix.com%2Flogo%2Fmaker%2Fesh%2F',
      // Default:
      redirect: 'https://users.wix.com/signin',
      limit: {
        // desktop: [],
        // tablet: [],
        mobile: ['US']
      }
    }

    const client_id = '352188552355.apps.googleusercontent.com'

    const isLoggedInPromise = isLoggedInUser()

    const fromFactor = getFormFactor()
    const limitedCountries = settings?.limit?.[fromFactor]
    const haslimit = (limitedCountries?.length > 0)
    const countryCodePromise = (haslimit) ? getCountryCode() : null

    window.onload = async function () {
      const [isLoggedIn, countryCode] = await Promise.all([isLoggedInPromise, countryCodePromise])
      if (isLoggedIn) return

      const shouldBlock = (haslimit && !limitedCountries.includes(countryCode))
      if (shouldBlock) return

      window.redirectWithCredential = (response) => {
        const url = `${settings.redirect}#state=googleOT&id_token=${response.credential}`
        window.location = url
      }

      const promptParent = document.createElement('div')
      promptParent.id = 'prompt-parent'
      document.body.appendChild(promptParent)

      google.accounts.id.initialize({
        client_id,
        cancel_on_tap_outside: false,
        callback: redirectWithCredential,
        prompt_parent_id: promptParent.id
      })
      google.accounts.id.prompt()

      fetchModalLoad()
    }

    async function getCountryCode() {
      try {
        const response = await fetch(
          'https://www.wix.com/wix-platform/mkt-apis/_functions/country'
        )
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error('couldn\'t reach mkt-apis');
        }
        const { countryCode } = await response.json();
        return countryCode;
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
        return null;
      }
    }

    function getFormFactor() {
      const userAgent = navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase()

      if (/mobile|android|iphone|ipod|blackberry|iemobile|opera mini/.test(userAgent)) {
        return 'mobile'
      } else if (/ipad|tablet|playbook|silk/.test(userAgent)) {
        return 'tablet'
      }
      return 'desktop'
    }

    async function isLoggedInUser() {
      const urlObj = new URL(window.location.href)
      const baseUrl = `${urlObj.protocol}//${urlObj.hostname}`
      const response = await fetch(
        baseUrl + '/_api/wix-html-login-webapp/user/getUserDetails',
        {
          method: 'GET',
          headers: { Accept: 'application/json' },
          credentials: 'include',
          cache: 'no-store',
        }
      )

      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error('couldn\'t get user details')
      }

      const userDetails = await response.json()

      return (userDetails.success && userDetails?.payload?.guid)
    }

    function fetchModalLoad() {
      fetch(
        `https://frog.wix.com/hls2?src=6&evid=186&app_url=wix.com&_=${ new Date().getTime() }`,
        {
          method: 'post',
          mode: 'no-cors',
          credentials: 'include',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
          body: '&' + encodeURIComponent('app_url=wix.com')
        }
      )
    }

  })()
</script>

<style>
  #prompt-parent {
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 10000;
  }

  @media (min-width: 769px) {

    /* Desktop */
    #prompt-parent {
      top: 20px;
      right: 20px;
      bottom: auto;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {

    /* Mobile */
    #prompt-parent {
      top: auto;
      right: auto;
      bottom: 0;
    }
  }
</style>

  <script id="wix-skip-played-animations-setup">
    (function() {
        var navEntry = performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0];
        if (navEntry && navEntry.type === 'reload') {
            return;
        }
        if ('PageRevealEvent' in window) {
            window.__pageRevealPromise = new Promise(function(resolve) {
                window.addEventListener('pagereveal', resolve, { once: true });
            });
        } else {
            window.__pageRevealPromise = Promise.resolve();
        }
    })();
  </script>

        <script>
  console.log("header-localization-fix-v2");

  const urlsToReplace = {
    es: "https://es.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    pt: "https://pt.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    de: "https://de.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    fr: "https://fr.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    it: "https://it.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    ja: "https://ja.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    ko: "https://ko.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    pl: "https://pl.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    tr: "https://tr.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    nl: "https://nl.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
    cs: "https://cs.wix.com/premium-purchase-plan/dynamo",
  };

  // Function to modify URLs
  const updateUrls = () => {
    const linksDesktop = document.querySelectorAll("ul.tvu6l8 a");
    const linksMobile = document.querySelectorAll("ul.DOVeHm a");

    const linkGroups = [linksDesktop, linksMobile];
    if (linkGroups.length > 0) {
      linkGroups.forEach((linkGroup) => {
        if (linkGroup.length > 0) {
          linkGroup.forEach((link) => {
            const url = new URL(link.href);
            const languageParam = url.searchParams.get("language");

            if (urlsToReplace[languageParam]) {
              link.href = urlsToReplace[languageParam];
            }
          });
        }
      });

      // Disconnect the observer after updating
      //   observer.disconnect();
    }
  };

  // Create a mutation observer
  const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
    updateUrls();
    // console.log("changed");
  });

  // Start observing with configuration
  observer.observe(document.body, {
    childList: true,
    subtree: true,
  });

  // Also try to run immediately in case the element is already there
  updateUrls();
</script>

    
    <!--embeds.BodyTop end-->


<script id="wix-first-paint">
    if (window.ResizeObserver &&
        (!window.PerformanceObserver || !PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes.indexOf('paint') === -1)) {
        new ResizeObserver(function (entries, observer) {
            entries.some(function (entry) {
                var contentRect = entry.contentRect;
                if (contentRect.width > 0 && contentRect.height > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(function (now) {
                        window.wixFirstPaint = now;
                        dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wixFirstPaint'));
                    });
                    observer.disconnect();
                    return true;
                }
            });
        }).observe(document.body);
    }
</script>


<script id="scroll-bar-width-calculation">
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.style.overflowY = 'scroll'
    div.style.width = '50px'
    div.style.height = '50px'
    div.style.visibility = 'hidden'
    document.body.appendChild(div)
    const scrollbarWidth= div.offsetWidth - div.clientWidth
    document.body.removeChild(div)
    if(scrollbarWidth > 0){
        document.body.style.setProperty('--scrollbar-width', `${scrollbarWidth}px`)
    }
</script>





    <style id=wix-custom-css>/* Users Custom CSS code */
 /* -------------------- Uncategorized -------------------- */

/* Closer Revealed Sections z-index */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-above-closer-container { z-index: 500; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-closer-container:focus-within { z-index: 10000; }

/* -------------------- Hero Section Button -------------------- */

/* Hero button arrow loop animation. */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-hero-button .wixui-button__icon { animation: arrow-move 5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-play-state: running; }

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-greenBanner{
    background-color: #D1F0B1;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-recomendedSale{
    background-color: #C7D1FF;
}
@keyframes arrow-move {
    from { transform: translateX(0px); }
    15% { transform: translateX(6px); }
    30% { transform: translateX(0px); }
    to { transform: translateX(0px); }
}


#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-ilPriceBox, #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-ilPriceBox p {
  font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif;
}

/* -------------------- 5 Steps Section -------------------- */

/* CSS Code that modifies the design of the Bullets */

/* Adding margin between the bullet number and the text */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li p { margin-left: 1.2vw; margin-top: 1.2vw; margin-bottom: 1.2vw; }

/* Adding a line under the text bullets execpt for the last bullet */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li:not(:last-child)::after{ content: ''; width: calc(100% + 1vw); height: 1px; background-color: #D0D0D0; display: block; left: -1.3vw; position: relative;}

/* Changing the bullet color and changing numbering content */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li::marker { color: #747678; content: "0" counter(list-item) ;}

/* -------------------- Plans Table -------------------- */

/* Sticky titles row - Adds z-index to the table titles row, so it will appear on top when scrolling */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-sticky-prices { z-index: 400; }

/* Feautres Table - CSS to rotate the arrow icon on click with a transition */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-expandable-feature-icon { transition: 0.25s; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-expandable-feature-icon-open { transform: rotate(180); }

/* Different CSS border properties that used accross the plans table */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-container-border-right { border-right: 1px solid #DFE5EB; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-container-border-left { border-left: 1px solid #DFE5EB; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-container-border-top { border-top: 1px solid #DFE5EB; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-container-border-bottom { border-bottom: 1px solid #DFE5EB; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-container-no-border-top { border-top: 0px solid transparent !important; }

/* Tooltip code - Please do not touch or modify it unnecessarily */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-tooltip-button { display: flex; flex-direction: column-reverse; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-tooltip-button::before { visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; scale: 0.8;transform-origin: bottom; content: ''; position: absolute; margin-left: 13px; margin-bottom: 25px; z-index: 100000000; transform: translate(6px, 0px); border: 8px solid white; border-color: white transparent transparent transparent; transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-tooltip-button::after { visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; scale: 0.9; width: max-content; max-width: 300px; content: attr(aria-label); font: var(--font_8); text-align: left; position: absolute; margin-bottom: 40px; z-index: 1000000; transform-origin: bottom; background-color: white; padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0px 2px 16px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12); transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-tooltip-button:hover::before { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; scale: 1.0; transform: translate(0px, 0px); transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-tooltip-button:hover::after { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; scale: 1.0; transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-tooltip-button:focus:before { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; scale: 1.0; transform: translate(0px, 0px); transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-tooltip-button:focus::after { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; scale: 1.0; transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-tooltip-button:focus-within:before { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; scale: 1.0; transform: translate(0px, 0px); transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-tooltip-button:focus-within::after { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; scale: 1.0; transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; }

/* Repeater cells hover - Turns light grey on mouse hover */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-feature-repeater-item { transition: 200ms; background-color: transparent; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-feature-repeater-item:hover .wixui-feature-repeater-item { background-color: #F1F3F6; }

/* Hides the Accessibility Texts that should be read only for screen readers. */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-screen-reader-only { opacity: 0; color: transparent; cursor: default; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-screen-reader-only .wixui-rich-text__text { width: 100%; height: 100%; color: transparent; opacity: 0; position: absolute; left: 0; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-screen-reader-only span { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }

/* -------------------- Breakpoints -------------------- */

/* Desktop Only CSS */
@media (min-width: 1201px) {
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-help-card-arrow { transition: 0s; }
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-help-card:hover .wixui-help-card-arrow > div { fill: #FFFFFF; }
}

/* Tablet CSS */
@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1200px) {
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li p { margin-top: 3vw; margin-bottom: 3vw;}
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li:not(:last-child)::after{ left: -2.1vw; }
}

/* Mobile CSS */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol { margin: 0px; }
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li p { margin-top: 4vw; margin-bottom: 4vw;}
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li:not(:last-child)::after { left: -4vw; width: calc(100% + 3vw);}
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-supportBtn .wixui-button__label {
        font-size: 0.9rem;
    }
}

/* -------------------------------------------------- */</style>

With a Premium plan you can connect your own domain, remove Wix branding from your site, and more. Most Premium plans include a 1 year free domain voucher, which is only valid with a purchase of a new domain from Wix and cannot be used to renew or extend a domain you already own. For best value, we recommend our yearly or multi-year plans.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Can I try a Wix Premium plan for free?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>

    </g>

</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Yes. Try any Wix Premium plan and if you decide it's not for you, you can cancel within 14 days and receive a full refund—no questions asked. This applies to the initial upgrade to a Premium plan.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">How do I get my free domain?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">

        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>

</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Most yearly or multi-year Premium plans come with a 1 year free domain voucher. You can choose your own domain name with suffixes such as .com, .net, .org and more. Once you find the perfect domain for your site, your voucher will be waiting for you at checkout. This voucher is only included with the first time purchase of a Premium plan. It is not included when renewing a plan or upgrading an existing plan. The voucher is redeemable within 60 days following your purchase, and is only valid towards the purchase of a new domain from Wix. The free domain voucher cannot be used to renew an existing domain.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Why do I need a custom domain?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>

</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">A custom domain, like mystunningwebsite.com, is a great way to get found online and promote your brand. Replace your free Wix URL (username.wixsite.com/sitename) with a custom domain you purchased from Wix, or one you already own.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">How can I get my own personalized email address?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>

</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Once you have your own domain, you can purchase a Google Workspace plan and get a custom email address using your domain, like <a data-auto-recognition="true" href="mailto:info@mystunningwebsite.com" class="wixui-rich-text__text">info@mystunningwebsite.com</a>. We've partnered with Google to give you 30GB of Drive storage, as well as Google Calendar, Docs, Sheets and Slides.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Where can I find my billing information?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">
    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>
    </g>

</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Sign into your Wix account and choose Billing &amp; Payments from the main menu at the top-right of the page. You'll see all your subscriptions and billing history right there.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">What online payments are accepted?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Wix accepts all major credit cards and debit cards, including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, JCB and Diners. Additional payment options may be available in your specific location.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">How do I know if the Enterprise plan is right for my business?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">

        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>

</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Wix Enterprise gives leading businesses the power to create, launch and manage fully-customized sites and webpages at scale. We offer powerful solutions built for enterprise-level marketing, multi-site management for franchises and commerce. With the help of the Enterprise team, plans are tailored to match your business’s exact needs. Every customer receives dedicated account management, prioritized support and direct access to product experts to help you drive success for every project.</p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><br class="wixui-rich-text__text"></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Pricing varies based on project scope, required solutions and more. <a href="https://www.wix.com/enterprise/form?referrer=wix-pp-faq-en&amp;uuid=null&amp;clientid=null" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Book a Demo</u></a> to find out more.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">How do I contact the Enterprise team?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>
    </g>

</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>

</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Submit a <a href="https://www.wix.com/enterprise/form?referrer=wix-pp-faq-en&amp;uuid=null&amp;clientid=null" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">call request</u></a> and a member from the Enterprise team will reach out to you via phone or email to discuss your project. If you have a preference on how you want to be contacted, or the best day/time to contact you, please include this when you submit your request.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">How do you support builds for large-scale projects?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">
    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">From complex websites to multi-site projects, the Enterprise team will support you every step of the way. In addition to your dedicated success manager and 24/7 priority support, our dedicated team of experts are champions of out-of-the box solutions, including project mapping, migration support, powerful site-building platforms, smart integrations, collaboration tools, marketing, SEO and more.</p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.wix.com/enterprise/form?referrer=wix-pp-faq-en&amp;uuid=null&amp;clientid=null" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Request a call</u></a> today to get started.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">How does Wix handle security assessments / questionnaires?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51" class="comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp7__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<script id="wix-skip-played-animations">
    window.__pageRevealPromise && window.__pageRevealPromise.then(function() {
        requestAnimationFrame(function() {
            try {
                var stored = sessionStorage.getItem('wix-motion-played-animations');
                if (stored) {
                    var played = JSON.parse(stored);
                    for (var compId in played) {
                        if (played[compId]) {
                            var el = document.getElementById(compId);
                            if (el) {
                                el.dataset.motionEnter = 'done';
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            } catch (e) {}
        });
    });
</script>

    <!-- Polyfills check -->
    <script>
		if (
			typeof Promise === 'undefined' ||
			typeof Set === 'undefined' ||
			typeof Object.assign === 'undefined' ||
			typeof Array.from === 'undefined' ||
			typeof Symbol === 'undefined'
		) {
			// send bi in order to detect the browsers in which polyfills are not working
			window.fedops.phaseStarted('missing_polyfills')
		}
    </script>

<script>
    window.firstPageId = 'c1dmp'

    if (window.requestCloseWelcomeScreen) {
        window.requestCloseWelcomeScreen()
    }
	if (!window.__browser_deprecation__) {
		window.fedops.phaseStarted('partially_visible', {paramsOverrides: { pageId: firstPageId, isSuccessfulSSR: !clientSideRender }})
	}
</script>
    
        <script>
			const wixAdsOffsetHeight = document.querySelector(':is(.WIX_ADS, #WIX_ADS)')?.offsetHeight || 0;
			const header = document.getElementsByTagName('header')[0];

			let headerOffsetHeight = 0;

			if (header) {
				const headerPosition = window.getComputedStyle(header).getPropertyValue('position').toLowerCase();
				const isHeaderStickyOrFixed = headerPosition === 'sticky' || headerPosition === 'fixed';
				headerOffsetHeight = isHeaderStickyOrFixed ? header.offsetHeight : 0;
			}

			document.documentElement.style.scrollPaddingTop = `${wixAdsOffsetHeight + headerOffsetHeight}px`;
        </script>

<script type="application/json" id="wix-warmup-data">{"platform":{"ssrPropsUpdates":[{"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzor":{"items":["da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc","33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2","40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29","b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad","e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153","52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db","ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1","293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159","c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4","691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0","0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51","32837abb-a753-4105-9922-21423c9d7520"]}},{"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">What is Premium plan?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\"><a href=\"https:\/\/www.wix.com\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\"><u class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">Creating your own website<\/u><\/a> is free. With a Premium plan you can connect your own domain, remove Wix branding from your site, and more. Most Premium plans include a 1 year free domain voucher, which is only valid with a purchase of a new domain from Wix and cannot be used to renew or extend a domain you already own. For best value, we recommend our yearly or multi-year plans.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"true","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzph2__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc":{"collapsed":false},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">Can I try a Wix Premium plan for free?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">Yes. Try any Wix Premium plan and if you decide it's not for you, you can cancel within 14 days and receive a full refund—no questions asked. This applies to the initial upgrade to a Premium plan.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">How do I get my free domain?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">Most yearly or multi-year Premium plans come with a 1 year free domain voucher. You can choose your own domain name with suffixes such as .com, .net, .org and more. Once you find the perfect domain for your site, your voucher will be waiting for you at checkout. This voucher is only included with the first time purchase of a Premium plan. It is not included when renewing a plan or upgrading an existing plan. The voucher is redeemable within 60 days following your purchase, and is only valid towards the purchase of a new domain from Wix. The free domain voucher cannot be used to renew an existing domain.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">Why do I need a custom domain?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">A custom domain, like mystunningwebsite.com, is a great way to get found online and promote your brand. Replace your free Wix URL (username.wixsite.com\/sitename) with a custom domain you purchased from Wix, or one you already own.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">How can I get my own personalized email address?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">Once you have your own domain, you can purchase a Google Workspace plan and get a custom email address using your domain, like <a data-auto-recognition=\"true\" href=\"mailto:info@mystunningwebsite.com\" class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">info@mystunningwebsite.com<\/a>. We've partnered with Google to give you 30GB of Drive storage, as well as Google Calendar, Docs, Sheets and Slides.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">Where can I find my billing information?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">Sign into your Wix account and choose Billing &amp; Payments from the main menu at the top-right of the page. You'll see all your subscriptions and billing history right there.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">What online payments are accepted?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">Wix accepts all major credit cards and debit cards, including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, JCB and Diners. Additional payment options may be available in your specific location.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">How do I know if the Enterprise plan is right for my business?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">Wix Enterprise gives leading businesses the power to create, launch and manage fully-customized sites and webpages at scale. We offer powerful solutions built for enterprise-level marketing, multi-site management for franchises and commerce. With the help of the Enterprise team, plans are tailored to match your business’s exact needs. Every customer receives dedicated account management, prioritized support and direct access to product experts to help you drive success for every project.<\/p>\n<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\"><br class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\"><\/p>\n<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">Pricing varies based on project scope, required solutions and more. <a href=\"https:\/\/www.wix.com\/enterprise\/form?referrer=wix-pp-faq-en&amp;uuid=null&amp;clientid=null\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\"><u class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">Book a Demo<\/u><\/a> to find out more.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">How do I contact the Enterprise team?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">Submit a <a href=\"https:\/\/www.wix.com\/enterprise\/form?referrer=wix-pp-faq-en&amp;uuid=null&amp;clientid=null\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\"><u class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">call request<\/u><\/a> and a member from the Enterprise team will reach out to you via phone or email to discuss your project. If you have a preference on how you want to be contacted, or the best day\/time to contact you, please include this when you submit your request.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">How do you support builds for large-scale projects?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">From complex websites to multi-site projects, the Enterprise team will support you every step of the way. In addition to your dedicated success manager and 24\/7 priority support, our dedicated team of experts are champions of out-of-the box solutions, including project mapping, migration support, powerful site-building platforms, smart integrations, collaboration tools, marketing, SEO and more.<\/p>\n<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\"><a href=\"https:\/\/www.wix.com\/enterprise\/form?referrer=wix-pp-faq-en&amp;uuid=null&amp;clientid=null\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\"><u class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">Request a call<\/u><\/a> today to get started.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">How does Wix handle security assessments \/ questionnaires?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">For more information on how Wix.com protects your data, compliance, certifications, GDPR and more, check out our <a href=\"https:\/\/www.wix.com\/trust-center\/security\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\"><u class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">white paper<\/u><\/a>. For security questions specific to your business, contact the Enterprise team using the form above.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51"}},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__32837abb-a753-4105-9922-21423c9d7520":{"html":"<h3 class=\"font_3 wixui-rich-text__text\"><span class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">Are there special programs for schools or universities?<\/span><\/h3>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__32837abb-a753-4105-9922-21423c9d7520":{"html":"<p class=\"font_8 wixui-rich-text__text\">Yes, Wix Enterprise partners with schools, universities and colleges to offer a digital solution to match their scale and needs. If your institution is looking to deliver projects at any scale, then <a href=\"https:\/\/www.wix.com\/enterprise\/form?referrer=wix-pp-faq-en&amp;uuid=null&amp;clientid=null\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\"><u class=\"wixui-rich-text__text\">contact the Enterprise team<\/u><\/a> and a member of our team will reach out to you with more information.<\/p>"},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__32837abb-a753-4105-9922-21423c9d7520":{"ariaAttributes":{"expanded":"false","describedBy":"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzp32__32837abb-a753-4105-9922-21423c9d7520"}}}],"ssrStyleUpdates":[{"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzov__32837abb-a753-4105-9922-21423c9d7520":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__40d651d5-bd3b-4a6e-95fe-ce197a208a29":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__b35baa5e-ad9c-47a6-ad1f-18f84ed52aad":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__e0ca3773-a0f0-47de-8bc7-b9321e4b0153":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__52bd2b96-1286-4245-9cd0-8b52b8dc24db":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__ab522e17-5eef-41c4-9f80-affa6e79e4c1":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__293963a5-e989-4e84-929e-013797921159":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__c969a2cb-c7a7-4a47-a783-bb8a8b59e4c4":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__691472b5-28a0-40af-a8be-4bb1a5c01ad0":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__0fa72bc9-a273-4415-83e0-491bb8596c51":{},"comp-m4hcaeoc4_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__32837abb-a753
